iti70:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti70:2.1:
“Monks, I have seen beings who–endowed with bodily misconduct, verbal misconduct, & mental misconduct;
who reviled noble ones, held wrong views and undertook actions under the influence of wrong views–
iti70:2.2:
at the break-up of the body, after death, have re-appeared in the plane of deprivation,
the bad destination, the lower realms, in hell.
iti70:3.1: It is not from having heard this from another contemplative or brahman that I tell you that I have seen beings who–
iti70:3.2:
endowed with bodily misconduct, verbal misconduct, & mental misconduct;
who reviled noble ones, held wrong views and undertook actions under the influence of wrong views–
iti70:3.3:
at the break-up of the body, after death,
have re-appeared in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
iti70:3.4: It is from having known it myself, seen it myself, realized it myself that I tell you that I have seen beings who–
iti70:4.1:
endowed with bodily misconduct, verbal misconduct, & mental misconduct;
who reviled noble ones, held wrong views and undertook actions under the influence of wrong views–
iti70:4.2:
at the break-up of the body, after death,
have re-appeared in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.”
iti70:5.3: doing wrong deeds with the body:
iti70:6.1: of next-to-nothing learning, a doer of evil
iti70:6.3: at the break-up of the body, undiscerning,
